scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gateway,core,operations,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:core" "npm run start:operations" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:core && npm run build:operations && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:gateway && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:operations && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:core && npm run test:operations
